subject: Cannot access volunteer portal — page won't load
description: Volunteer reports a blank white page when trying to sign in to the Coral Futures volunteer portal.

subject: Monitoring session schedule shows wrong dates
description: June schedule on the volunteer portal still shows May monitoring dates.

subject: Request for copy of completion certificate
description: Volunteer needs a reissued PDF certificate for the reef monitoring training completed in March.

subject: Equipment check-out form not submitting
description: Online equipment reservation form returns an error on submission — volunteers cannot check out dive gear.

subject: Volunteer hours not credited after Saturday session
description: Three volunteers report their 1st June monitoring session hours were not added to their profile.

subject: Add species ID quiz to training portal
description: Volunteer coordinator requests a coral species identification quiz be added to the online training module.

subject: NOAA data-sharing agreement form missing from portal
description: NOAA partner cannot locate the MOU data-sharing agreement PDF on the partner resources page.

subject: How to sign up for the Kāneʻohe Bay monitoring rotation
description: New volunteer asking how to register for the 1st and 3rd Saturday monitoring schedule.

subject: Dive safety briefing video not loading
description: Required pre-dive safety briefing video returns a 504 error for three volunteers.

subject: Quarterly monitoring data report — download broken
description: Q1 2026 monitoring summary PDF download link on the partner dashboard is returning a 404.

subject: Volunteer map — pins showing wrong monitoring sites
description: The volunteer-facing map is displaying last season's site markers, not the current 2026 monitoring coordinates.

subject: Seaview grad student — access to historical coral data
description: PhD student at Seaview requesting read access to the 2020–2024 baseline coral survey dataset.

subject: New volunteer orientation — add Hawaiian history module
description: Request to include a short Hawaiian cultural context module in the volunteer orientation curriculum.

subject: Gear inventory spreadsheet out of date
description: Dive gear inventory on the shared drive has not been updated since February — BCD count is wrong.

subject: Bulk volunteer sign-up for upcoming monitoring session
description: Need to register 12 volunteers at once for the July 5 monitoring make-up session.

subject: Field tablet GPS accuracy — triage note
description: TRIAGE: Kaipo flagged that two Coral Futures tablets show ±15m GPS error. Likely antenna calibration needed before next dive.

subject: Cannot find 2026 monitoring protocol PDF
description: Volunteer cannot locate the updated 2026 reef monitoring protocol document on the resources page.

subject: Photo upload quota reached — can it be increased?
description: Volunteer account hit the 200-photo monthly upload limit — requesting an increase for an intensive survey week.

subject: Broken link in volunteer welcome email
description: The 'Get Started' link in the new volunteer welcome email leads to a 404 page.

subject: Kāneʻohe Bay session reminder — wrong time on calendar invite
description: Calendar invite for the June 21 monitoring session shows 10 AM instead of the correct 9 AM start.
